creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jadawin     2008-05-07 12:40:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns/powerdns-devel   Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    dns/powerdns-devel/files 
                             patch-modules_gpgsqlbackend_Makefile_in 
  Added files:
    dns/powerdns-devel/files pdns-devel.in 
  Removed files:
    dns/powerdns-devel/files patch-pdns_qtype_cc 
                             tables-mssql_or_sybase.sql 
                             tables-mysql.sql tables-pgsql.sql 
                             tables-sqlite.sql 
  Log:
  PowerDNS is an advanced DNS server, which allows for several different
  backends. Current backends include MySQL, PostgreSQL, bind, etc.
  
  License: GPL V2
  
  WWW: http://www.powerdns.com/
  
  PR:             ports/122948
  Submitted by:   Ralf van der Enden <tremere@cainites.net>
  Approved by:    thierry (mentor)
